description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house surrounded by dense evergreen trees, set on a rectangular grassy plot. The house features a flat roof with multiple levels and sections, including a prominent garage on one side and a main entrance accessible by a stone path. The exterior is primarily composed of brown brick with large windows, especially at the rear, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding landscape. The back of the house showcases a curved wall of floor-to-ceiling windows, likely for a living or dining area, and several balconies or terraces are visible. The property is bordered by tall coniferous trees, providing privacy and a natural setting. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on integration with the wooded environment.
description: A large, modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, expansive windows, and surrounded by dense evergreen trees on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, stone path, and a clear view of the flat roof and brick facade.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the curved wall of large windows and the house's integration with the surrounding trees.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by tall trees, with only the upper part of the house and its large windows visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the garage, driveway, and a mix of windows and brickwork partially obscured by trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture and curved windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, stone path, and no porch, flanked by garage and minimal decorative elements.
